summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Expense Tracker MVP with 5 new features. Backend APIs fully functional (23/23 tests passed). Frontend loads correctly with all new features working. Minor chart rendering issues due to container dimensions.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart rendering errors - width/height showing as -1, causing console warnings
Clipboard write permission denied in automated testing environment

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/export/csv returns CSV file with expense data
Backend API: GET /api/alerts returns budget alerts (overspend/near-limit)
Backend API: GET /api/report/monthly returns comprehensive monthly report
Backend API: GET /api/report/monthly?month=2026-04 with specific month parameter
Backend API: PUT /api/expenses/{id} updates an existing expense
Frontend: Expenses page has 'Export CSV' button that downloads CSV
Frontend: Expenses page has edit (pencil) icon on each expense item
Frontend: Clicking edit pencil opens modal pre-filled with expense data
Frontend: AddExpenseModal shows 'Edit Expense' title when editing and 'Add Expense' when creating
Frontend: Summary page loads with Monthly/Weekly tabs
Frontend: Summary page period navigation (prev/next) works
Frontend: Summary page shows stats cards (total, avg daily, top category, transactions)
Frontend: Reports page loads with month selector
Frontend: Reports page shows total spending, stat cards, charts, top expenses
Frontend: Reports page has Share, Copy Link, and Download CSV buttons
Frontend: Reports page Copy Link button copies URL to clipboard
Frontend: Reports page CSV download works
Frontend: Dashboard shows BudgetAlerts component when budgets are near/over limit
Frontend: Sidebar has 6 nav items (Dashboard, Expenses, Budgets, Summary, Reports, Insights)
Frontend: All 6 sidebar navigation links work correctly
Backend API: All existing endpoints continue to work (categories, expenses, budgets, dashboard, insights)
Frontend: Expense editing modal pre-fills form fields correctly
Frontend: Modal titles change correctly between Add/Edit modes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues in SpendingCharts component - ensure proper container dimensions for Recharts components
